art of sound

The Philosophy

Why
Zahau

We've spent fifteen years refining a single thing: how to bring out the musician already inside every student. The result is a curriculum that's structured, joyful, and uncompromising on craft.

01

World-class faculty

Performing musicians trained at Berklee, ABRSM, and top conservatories.

02

Performance-first

Quarterly virtual recitals build stage confidence from day one.

03

Online-first learning

Interactive live sessions plus structured digital resources.

04

Recognised certification

ABRSM, Trinity, and Zahau performance certificates.

Our Catalog

Featured
disciplines

View all courses
The Pathway

The Zahau
journey

Our pedagogical framework takes you from initial curiosity to professional mastery — six deliberate steps.

01

Discover

Audition and placement to find your perfect fit.

02

Learn

Weekly one-on-one sessions with faculty masters.

03

Practice

Access to interactive digital workbooks & guides.

04

Perform

Quarterly stage showcases and virtual recital nights.

05

Record

Virtual performance reviews to archive your progress.

06

Graduate

Certification recognised by international boards.

FAQ

Common
questions

What ages do you teach?+

From 5 years old to adult learners. Every class is paced for the individual.

Do I need to bring my own instrument?+

No — practice instruments are available at every branch. We help you choose your first instrument when you're ready.

How long are classes?+

45 minutes for foundation, 60 minutes for intermediate and above. Weekly cadence.

Can I switch courses?+

Yes — many students explore multiple instruments. Talk to admissions about combined tracks.

Are there scholarships?+

Yes. We run a merit-based scholarship audition each spring.

Get Started

Ready to
play?

Tell us what you'd like to learn. We'll match you with a faculty mentor and design a trial class around your goals — free of charge.

Newsletter

Stay in the loop

Subscribe to receive announcements for student recitals, faculty masterclasses, and educational resources.

Zahaumusic

Excellence in musical education. Dedicated to fostering a culture of virtuosity, rigorous craft, and creative exploration.
